# Borderless Creators

Borderless Creators is an AI-native creative lab by Leon Chen for intelligence, identity, worlds, and stories.

## Canonical URL
https://borderlesscreators.com/

## Related sites
- Leon Chen (personal brand): https://leonchen.ai
- Neural Field (AI News Intelligence Center): https://ainews.borderlesscreators.com/

## Project Universe

- Neural Field: Live. AI-powered news intelligence for tracking the frontier of AI, sports, gaming, platforms, and creative technology. URL: https://ainews.borderlesscreators.com/
- Digital Leon: In Lab. A digital identity experiment exploring AI agents, synthetic media, and more human ways to introduce ideas.
- World Model Studio: Exploring. Experiments in AI-assisted game scene creation, remastering, spatial imagination, and world-building workflows.
- Manga Lab: Exploring. AI-generated Japanese-style manga experiments blending character design, visual narrative, and cross-cultural storytelling.

## Four Territories
- Intelligence: Signals, briefs, research workflows, and news systems.
- Identity: Digital humans, AI agents, personal media, and synthetic presence.
- Worlds: Scene generation, simulation, games, and spatial storytelling.
- Stories: Manga, publishing experiments, cross-cultural narratives, and creative IP.

## Brand Summary
Borderless Creators explores how AI expands creative systems across intelligence workflows, digital identity, world-building, and visual storytelling. It is an experimental creative lab, not a personal resume or blog.

## Founder
Leon Chen — https://leonchen.ai

## Contact
contact@borderlesscreators.com
